from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.types import *
import random
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

df_company = spark.read.parquet(f"{base_path}/dim_company")
df_profit_unit = spark.read.parquet(f"{base_path}/dim_profit_unit")
df_cost_object = spark.read.parquet(f"{base_path}/dim_cost_object_raw")
df_account = spark.read.parquet(f"{base_path}/dim_financial_account_raw")
df_currency = spark.read.parquet(f"{base_path}/dim_currency")
df_calendar = spark.read.parquet(f"{base_path}/dim_fiscal_calendar")

transactions = []
transaction_id = 1

companies = df_company.collect()
profit_units = df_profit_unit.collect()
cost_objects = df_cost_object.select("cost_object_code","company_sk").distinct().collect()
accounts = df_account.select("account_number").distinct().collect()
currencies = df_currency.select("currency_code").collect()
dates = df_calendar.select("fiscal_date").collect()

for i in range(10000):   # generate 10k transactions
    
    company = random.choice(companies)
    
    # choose profit unit belonging to that company
    pu = random.choice([p for p in profit_units if p.company_sk == company.company_sk])
    
    co = random.choice([c for c in cost_objects if c.company_sk == company.company_sk])
    
    account = random.choice(accounts)
    
    currency = random.choice(currencies)
    
    date = random.choice(dates)
    
    
    amount = float(f"{random.uniform(100, 10000):.2f}")
    
    dc_flag = random.choice(["D","C"])
    
    transactions.append((
        transaction_id,
        company.company_sk,
        pu.profit_unit_sk,
        co.cost_object_code,
        account.account_number,
        currency.currency_code,
        amount,
        dc_flag,
        date.fiscal_date,
        datetime.now()
    ))
    
    transaction_id += 1

schema_tx = StructType([
    StructField("transaction_id", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("company_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("profit_unit_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("cost_object_code", StringType(), False),
    StructField("account_number", StringType(), False),
    StructField("transaction_currency", StringType(), False),
    StructField("amount", DoubleType(), False),
    StructField("debit_credit_flag", StringType(), False),
    StructField("transaction_date", DateType(), False),
    StructField("ingestion_timestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

df_tx = spark.createDataFrame(transactions, schema_tx)

schema_fx = StructType([
    StructField("currency_code", StringType(), False),
    StructField("rate_to_usd", DoubleType(), False),
    StructField("rate_date", DateType(), False),
    StructField("ingestion_timestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

df_fx = spark.createDataFrame(fx_rates, schema_fx)

df_fx.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
    f"{base_path}/fact_exchange_rates_raw"

budget_rows = []

for year in [2023, 2024, 2025]:
    
    growth_factor = 1 + ((year - 2023) * 0.05)  # 5% growth per year
    
    for month in range(1, 13):
        
        for company in companies:
            
            # profit units belonging to that company
            pu_list = [p for p in profit_units if p.company_sk == company.company_sk]
            
            for pu in pu_list:
                
                # choose 20 random accounts for budgeting
                selected_accounts = random.sample(accounts, 20)
                
                for acc in selected_accounts:
                    
                    base_budget = random.uniform(5000, 50000)
                    
                    monthly_variation = random.uniform(0.9, 1.1)
                    
                    final_budget = base_budget * monthly_variation * growth_factor
                    
                    budget_rows.append((
                        company.company_sk,
                        pu.profit_unit_sk,
                        acc.account_number,
                        year,
                        month,
                        float(f"{final_budget:.2f}"),
                        datetime.now()

schema_budget = StructType([
    StructField("company_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("profit_unit_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("account_number", StringType(), False),
    StructField("fiscal_year", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("fiscal_month", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("budget_amount", DoubleType(), False),
    StructField("ingestion_timestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

df_budget = spark.createDataFrame(budget_rows, schema_budget)
